title: AutoContext MCP Tools manifest
description: Single source of truth for AutoContext's MCP Tools and MCP Tasks. Top-level keys other than '$schema' and 'schemaVersion' name a worker process (lowercase identifier, e.g. 'dotnet', 'workspace', 'web') and hold an array of group definitions.

$schema.description: Path or URL to this schema file. Enables editor IntelliSense.

schemaVersion.description: Manifest format version. Bumped on breaking changes.

^[a-z][a-z0-9]*$.description: Groups owned by one worker process. The key is the worker name (e.g. 'dotnet').

group.title: Group
group.description: A worker-owned bundle of MCP Tools (Copilot-facing) plus the MCP Tasks they dispatch (worker-facing).

tag.description: UI label for the group (display only).

description.description: Group-level description shown in the extension UI.

endpoint.description: Transport-agnostic endpoint identifier for the worker process. Today: a Windows named pipe name in kebab-case (dots allowed for namespacing).

tools.description: MCP Tool definitions — what Copilot sees.

tasks.description: MCP Task definitions — what the worker executes. Every task here must be referenced by at least one tool, and every tool task reference must point to a task here.

tool.title: MCP Tool
tool.description: An MCP Tool: the Copilot-facing surface. Dispatches one or more MCP Tasks when invoked.

tag.description: UI label for the MCP Tool (display only).

description.description: AutoContext-side description shown in the extension UI. Distinct from definition.description, which is shown to Copilot.

workspaceFlags.description: Capability flags the workspace must have for this tool to be registered. Empty array = always register.

tasks.description: MCP Task names dispatched when this tool is invoked. Each must reference a task in the sibling tasks[] array.

toolDefinition.title: MCP Tool definition (Copilot-facing)
toolDefinition.description: The MCP-facing contract: how the tool appears to Copilot. Passed to McpServerToolCreateOptions at registration time.

description.description: MCP Tool description shown to Copilot. Should clearly state what the tool does, when to use it, and what to pass as input — Copilot uses this to decide whether to call the tool.

parameters.description: Parameter map (camelCase names) → parameter spec. Transformed into JSON Schema (type: object, properties, required) and advertised as the MCP inputSchema for this tool.

parameter.title: Tool parameter
parameter.description: One parameter inside a tool's inputSchema.

type.description: JSON Schema primitive type for this parameter.

description.description: Parameter description shown to Copilot. Should be unambiguous about what value to provide.

required.description: Set to true on required parameters. Omit entirely for optional parameters — do not write 'required: false'.

task.title: MCP Task
task.description: An MCP Task: the worker-facing execution unit. Dispatched by McpToolClient over a named pipe to its group's worker.

description.description: Optional. Shown in the extension UI. May be omitted for single-task MCP Tools where the tool description suffices.

version.description: Semantic version (MAJOR.MINOR.PATCH). Bumped when the task's behavior or output changes.

priority.description: Parallelism grouping within an MCP Tool invocation. Tasks with the same nonzero priority run concurrently (Task.WhenAll); priority groups execute in ascending order. Omit or 0 = sequential after all prioritized groups.

editorconfig.description: EditorConfig keys this task consumes (snake_case identifiers we don't own). McpToolClient resolves these against the file's effective .editorconfig and ships them in the wire envelope's editorconfig field.

toolName.title: MCP Tool name
toolName.description: MCP Tool identifier (snake_case). Must be unique across the entire manifest.

taskName.title: MCP Task name
taskName.description: MCP Task identifier (snake_case). Must be unique within its group.
